_comment: Single source of truth for the main-menu first-visit image-optimization pass. The optimizer script (frontend/scripts/optimize-main-menu-assets.mjs) reads `targets` to emit deterministic AVIF + WebP derivatives next to each PNG source; the runtime (catalogData.imageSetFor / style.css / MainMenu.tsx <picture>) prefers those derivatives with the original PNG kept as the universal fallback. PNG sources stay checked in and authoritative. To regenerate: `npm --prefix frontend run optimize:assets`.

targets.note: Full-bleed accepted background scene (~2.6MB PNG); opaque, photographic.
Carved-stone rail/tab surface (~440KB PNG, opaque). Single heaviest menu image; gates the buttons layer in the cold-load reveal. Higher quality preserves the 1024px tile under `repeat`.
